# Audit Logs

**Slug:** `audit-logs` · **Version:** `2021-03` · **Tools:** 1

Load your account's audit logs for monitoring activities on Talend Cloud applications, ensuring data security and managing regulatory compliance risks.

[← Back to API index](./README.md)

## Tools by tag

- [Audit logs](#audit-logs) (1)

## Audit logs

### `audit_logs__getAllAuditLogsUsingGET`

```
GET /security/audit/logs
```

Return audit logs for current account with the latest date on top

Return audit logs about the events triggered within the hot period defined by your license. With the latest timestamp on top, the results are paginated with the page number and page size parameters. The pagination information is part of the response header. 
 The status codes explained on this page are the codes used by the Audit log API.  If you need information about the HTTP status codes that appear in the body of your audit logs, see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_HTTP_status_codes

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fromDate` | query | `string` | no | Lower bound of the date window (ISO 8601 datetime format). Specifying this parameter will return audit logs from this date to toDate parameter if present or to current date otherwise. fromDate paramet |
| `fromId` | query | `string` | no | Lower bound of the log window (UUID). Specifying this parameter will return audit logs from a specific id to toDate if present, or current date otherwise. If the id doesn’t exist, an empty array is re |
| `page` | query | `string` | no | Page number starting from 1. |
| `size` | query | `string` | no | Number of logs returned per page. The maximum value is 1000. |
| `toDate` | query | `string` | no | Upper bound of the date window (ISO 8601 datetime format). Specifying this parameter will return audit logs from fromDate if present, or from fromId if present, or from current date minus period hot d |
| `Authorization` | header | `string` | yes | Bearer {your personal access token} |
